eyebrow: Gas Safe Heating Engineer — Leeds & Wakefield
hero_headline: The heating engineer who answers his own phone.
hero_sub: Boiler servicing, repairs and installs across Leeds. Tidy work, fair prices, same-day where I can.

services.title: Boiler Servicing
services.desc: Annual service, fully certified, with proper gas safety checks. Keeps your warranty valid and your boiler safe.

services.title: Breakdowns & Repairs
services.desc: Same-day where possible. No heat, no hot water, a leak — ring me and I'll tell you straight. No call-out hard sell.

services.title: New Installs
services.desc: Boiler swaps and full installs, fitted clean and certified. I leave your house tidier than I found it.

about_quote: Twenty years on the tools and I still answer my own phone. I turn up when I say I will, and I leave your house tidier than I found it.
about_sig_line: Dave Demo Heating — Gas Safe No. 123456
review_quote: Quick, tidy, professional. Sorted the boiler same day.

hero_headline: Local plumbing you can actually rely on.
hero_sub: Leaks, bathrooms and emergencies across Sheffield. No call-out fee, straight answers, tidy work.

services.title: Leaks & Repairs
services.desc: Dripping taps to burst pipes — found fast, fixed properly, mess cleaned up before I leave.

services.title: Bathroom Installs
services.desc: Full bathrooms fitted to a standard you'd show your neighbours. Clean lines, no leaks, no fuss.

services.title: Emergency Callout
services.desc: Water where it shouldn't be? Ring me. I'll talk you through the stopcock and get to you quick.

about_quote: I'd rather do one job properly than three in a rush. You get me, not a call centre, and a price that doesn't change at the door.
about_highlight: You get me, not a call centre,
review_quote: Turned up on time, fixed the leak, fair price. Booked him for the bathroom now.

hero_headline: An electrician who turns up and explains it plainly.
hero_sub: Rewires, EICRs and EV chargers across York. Certified, neat, and no jargon at the door.

services.title: Rewires
services.desc: Full and partial rewires done clean, certified, and signed off — minimal disruption, no surprises.

services.title: EICR Certificates
services.desc: Landlord and homeowner safety reports, done thoroughly with a plain-English summary of what matters.

services.title: EV Charger Installs
services.desc: Home charge points fitted and certified, sited where you actually want them. OZEV-grant savvy.

about_quote: I'll tell you what needs doing now and what can wait. No scare tactics, no jargon — just safe work, certified and tidy.
about_sig_line: York Demo Electrics — NICEIC No. D998877
review_quote: Explained everything, no jargon, left the place spotless. Will use again.
